classification.task_goal: Rewrite the provided text to improve coherence and detail, including references to Hadith and Quran verses while maintaining objectivity.
primary_constraints: Mention everything in great detail, including Hadithes and Quran Verses.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially provided a coherent rewrite but did not fully adhere to the constraints of including all details and maintaining objectivity, leading to a drift. The user later requested a more detailed and objective rewrite, indicating a repair of the constraints.
